data.name: 娜莉亞的新任務
data.detailed_description:
這是一款融合了俯視戰鬥與平台要素的重口味動作遊戲。

你將扮演女騎士娜莉雅，她受命提升一座被摧毀城鎮的支持率。為了完成任務，她會不擇手段——為當地居民收集資源、修復損壞的祭壇……甚至用自己的身體來滿足他們的慾望。

多虧她嚴格的騎士訓練，娜蕾亞的身體非常堅韌且恢復迅速，這開啟了各種激烈、正常來說不可能實現的性愛玩法。

=遊戲玩法=

這是一款在平台和俯視戰鬥之間無縫轉換的成人奇幻2D動作遊戲。間單的操作讓你可以馬上享受遊戲，不用花幾小時學習操作。收集材料來製作和升級武器，製作物品來幫助更容易對抗敵人。幫助村民來解鎖一些瑟瑟的劇情並收集獎勵。

=變態動作=

各種變態小遊戲和露骨的劇情。25+獨特、無修正、重口味的CG和15+獨特的像素色色動畫等待你發現。這款遊戲專注於奇幻和重口味，不適合只想要性感愛情故事的人！

=探索=

探索多個獨特的地圖，發現新敵人並解鎖武器淫蕩的記憶。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 11
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 5 3500U
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx x8
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Fedora Linux 42
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 5 3500U
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx x8
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

data.name: Narea's New Mission
data.detailed_description:
Thrust into this hardcore hentai action game that blends top-down combat with platformer elements.

You take on the role of Narea, a female knight assigned to boost the approval rating in a devastated town. To get the job done, she'll do whatever it takes—gathering resources for the locals, repairing damaged altars... and even offering her body to fulfill their desires.

Thanks to her intense knight training, Narea's body is tough and heals quickly, opening the door to all sorts of intense, unconventional sexual plays that wouldn't be possible otherwise.

=Game Play=

This is an adult fantasy 2D action game with a seamless transition between platformer and top-down action. Simple control that doesn't require hours of getting use to. Collect materials to craft and upgrade weapons and to craft items to help fighting enemies easier. Help out the villagers to unlock lewd stories and collect rewards. 

=Hentai action=

Various hentai mini games and erotic stories. 25+ unique, uncensored, hardcore explicit CGs and 15+ unique pixel animations waiting for you to discover. This game focuses on fantastic and hardcore sexual fetishes. It is not for someone who just want a sexy love story!

=Explore=

Explore several unique maps to discover new enemies and unlock the lewd memories of the weapons.
